scope.projectDisabledTooltip: Open a project to use project settings

uiLanguage.label: Interface Language
uiLanguage.description: Language for the app interface, independent of Claude's response language.

useCtrlEnterToSend.label: Use Ctrl Enter To Send
useCtrlEnterToSend.description: When enabled, use Ctrl/Cmd+Enter to send prompts instead of just Enter. This allows Enter to create new lines.

focusInputOnEditorContext.label: Focus chat input after attaching file path
focusInputOnEditorContext.description: When you press Alt+K in the editor, move focus to the chat input after inserting the file path.

respectGitignoreForContext.label: Respect .gitignore for editor context
respectGitignoreForContext.description: When on, contents of .gitignore'd files are excluded from the editor context — only the file path is sent.

openSettings.label: Open Settings as
openSettings.description: Show Settings as an overlay or in a new tab.

chatPagination.label: Paginate chat history
chatPagination.description: Load older messages as you scroll. Off loads the whole conversation at once.

configDir.description: Home directory for Claude's config. Same as the CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR environment variable.
configDir.projectUnavailable: Open a project to set a project value.

colorTheme.label: Color Theme
colorTheme.description: Choose the color theme for the interface

fontSize.label: Font Size
fontSize.description: Base font size for the interface

autoScrollThreshold.label: Auto-scroll resume distance
autoScrollThreshold.description: Scrolling up always pauses auto-scroll so you can read freely. It resumes once you scroll back within this many pixels of the bottom. Smaller means you must return closer to re-engage. Default {{value}}.

sendUsageStatistics.label: Send usage statistics
sendUsageStatistics.description: Sends usage statistics that do not directly identify you, to help improve the product. Source code and personal data are never sent. You can turn this off anytime.

bypassMode.label: Disable Bypass Mode
bypassMode.description: Prevent bypass permissions mode from being activated

defaultMode.label: Default Input Mode
defaultMode.description: Initial permission mode when opening a new session

cliUpdate.confirmMessage: Updating replaces the Claude Code CLI and may interrupt running sessions. Continue?

sound.label: Sound
sound.description: Sound played when a desktop notification fires. Selecting a sound previews it once.
sound.emptyDescription: No system sounds detected. Select Off to silence notifications.

permissions.title: Permissions
permissions.revokeHint: To revoke, change in your browser settings.

connection.title: Connection

enable.label: Remote Tunnel (Unofficial)
enable.description: Expose your local server via cloudflared for remote access. No account required. If cloudflared isn’t installed, you’ll be asked to install it first.

connection.estimatedTime: This typically takes ~1 min (If installation is required, it takes about 3 mins.)

sleepPrevention.title: Sleep Prevention
sleepPrevention.label: Prevent Sleep
sleepPrevention.description: Keep your machine awake while the tunnel is active, even with the lid closed.

app.label: Terminal App
app.description: Terminal application used when running 'Open Claude in Terminal'
app.jetbrainsDescription: JetBrains IDE built-in terminal is always used.

path.title: Claude CLI
path.label: CLI Path
path.description: Path to Claude CLI executable (leave empty for auto-detect)

nodePath.title: Node.js
nodePath.label: Node Path
nodePath.description: Path to Node.js executable that runs the backend (leave empty for auto-detect). Takes effect after restart.

notInstalled.title: A required dependency
notInstalled.description: Due to marketplace policy, this feature cannot be bundled in. It is published as a separate library that you need to install yourself.
notInstalled.retryHint: After installing, click Retry below — no IDE restart needed.

sponsor.title: Support Claude Code with GUI
sponsor.description: Claude Code with GUI stays free to use. Sponsoring keeps this independent, JetBrains-first project going.
promises: Unlimited access to every sponsor-only feature
The top tier — no higher paid tier, ever
Your price stays locked, even if it rises for new sponsors

activate.title: Already a sponsor?
activate.description: Enter your sponsor key to activate sponsorship on this device.
activate.invalid: That key isn't valid. Please check it and try again.

active.title: Sponsoring
active.description: Thank you for supporting Claude Code with GUI.
